theme_archetype.name: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast
theme_archetype.rationale: A pure black-and-white editorial aesthetic emphasizing authority, clarity, and precision. It perfectly bridges the gap between Business Analytics (professional, data-driven) and Computer Engineering (structured, technical), using massive whitespace and typographic hierarchy instead of decorative colors.

rules: Strict monochrome palette. No bright colors whatsoever.
Use #0A0A0A for primary text (never pure black #000000 to reduce eye strain, though pure black is fine for solid shapes).
Use #666666 for secondary text (dates, tags, small descriptors).
Use #E5E5E5 for subtle 1px borders and dividers.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-none

rules: Headings must have tight tracking (tracking-tighter) to mimic classic Swiss editorial posters.
Never use center alignment for large blocks of text. Left-align almost everything to respect the grid.
Use mono font (JetBrains Mono) for tech skills, timeline dates, and small tags to inject an engineering feel.

layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento/Tetris Grid Protocol. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 or gap-12.
rules: Generous spacing: Use p-8 or p-12 for internal card padding.
Borders: 1px solid #E5E5E5 to define grids and sections. The 'Technical' Look.
Negative space is a first-class citizen. Leave empty columns in the 12-col grid to create tension.

interactions_motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling (use Lenis if possible, or CSS scroll-behavior: smooth).
interactions_motion.hover: Subtle. For buttons: invert colors (white bg to black bg, black text to white text). For cards: subtle border color darkening from #E5E5E5 to #0A0A0A, or a slight -translate-y-1. No bouncy animations.
interactions_motion.links: Underline on hover for text links. No background color shifts.

images.usage: Use as a subtle overlay or an inset image in the hero section to convey 'structure' and 'systems' without being overt.
Use as a muted background texture for a specific section, like the Contact or Projects section.

header.layout: Fixed top, bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md, border-b border-[#E5E5E5].
header.elements: Left: 'Chris Ruzario' in bold. Right: Nav links + CTA. Mobile: Hamburger menu.

hero.typography: Massive H1 for name: 'Chris Ruzario'. Tagline above it in mono font: 'BUSINESS ANALYTICS | DATA, STRATEGY & SYSTEMS'.
hero.content: Intro line: 'I turn data, business problems, and technology into clear insights and practical solutions.'
hero.buttons: Primary: 'View Projects' (black bg, white text). Secondary: 'Contact Me' (transparent bg, border border-black, black text).

about.layout: Grid 12 cols. Text spans col-span-8. Large typography for a statement.

skills.content: List: Business Analysis, Data Analysis, SQL, Excel, Power BI, Python Basics, R, Dashboarding, Problem Solving, Communication.
skills.tags: Display these skills as pill-shaped tags or a stark list with mono-font numbering.

projects.layout: 3 large cards stacked or in a dynamic grid.
projects.card_style: 1px solid border. Padding 8. Image placeholder/abstract image on top, clean text below.
projects.content: Tools used in mono font. Summary in secondary text. 'View Project' link with an arrow icon.

experience.layout: Vertical timeline. Left column: Year/Date (mono font). Right column: Role and details.
experience.style: Use a 1px vertical line (#E5E5E5) connecting the nodes.

contact.layout: Split grid. Left: Huge text 'Let's talk.' Right: Working Contact Form (Shadcn customized).
contact.form_style: Inputs with border-b only (no full box), or very minimal 1px border boxes. Sharp corners.

footer.content: Name + 'Built with data, design, and curiosity.' Links to LinkedIn/GitHub.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the pure black and white (with grey borders) palette. Do not add any gradients, shadows, or colors.
Configure tailwind.config.js to set the default sans font to 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif.
Ensure all interactive elements have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Use standard Shadcn components for the Contact form, but override the default Vercel-like styles to be brutalist and flat (e.g., sharp corners rounded-none, 1px border).
For the hero layout, embrace asymmetry. Do not center everything. Left-align the massive H1 text.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind structure over predefined Shadcn cards for the main sections to ensure the asymmetrical, Swiss grid feel.
